intro: Every step could be your last—move or be hunted.
description:
Drop straight into a high-intensity battle royale set in a dense, unpredictable forest. Leap from the plane, hit the ground running, and arm yourself fast—because danger is already closing in. Weapons are scattered everywhere, from long-range sniper rifles to explosive launchers and close-combat options, giving you the freedom to play your way.

The map keeps you on edge. A deadly shrinking zone forces constant movement, while supply crates crash down from the sky, packed with powerful gear—but reaching them could cost you everything. With 25 aggressive, armed opponents hunting across the terrain, every moment is a fight to stay alive.

Key Features:
• Adrenaline-fueled battle royale in a dynamic forest
• Parachute in and start looting instantly
• 8 weapon types with 50+ pickups to discover
• 25 relentless enemies actively hunting you
• Shrinking danger zone that ramps up the pressure
• High-risk supply drops with weapons, ammo, and health
• Smooth core mechanics: movement, shooting, weapon switching, grenades, and combat

Be the last one standing.
Gear up, stay ahead of the zone, and outfight everyone in your path. Only the fastest and smartest will survive.
